COMPREHENSIVE CHILD HEALTHCARE

General Pediatrics

Expert pediatric care for your child from birth through adolescence. With 18+ years of experience and UK training, Dr. Sanjay D Swamy provides compassionate, evidence-based healthcare in a child-friendly environment.

ABOUT THE SERVICE

Your Partner in Your Child's Health Journey

General pediatrics covers all aspects of child healthcare, from preventive care and routine checkups to diagnosing and treating common childhood illnesses. Our goal is to ensure your child grows healthy and happy.

At our clinic, every child receives personalized care tailored to their unique needs. Dr. Sanjay D Swamy combines his 18+ years of pediatric expertise with international training from the UK to provide the highest standard of care.

We believe in building lasting relationships with families, guiding parents through every stage of their child's development. From the first newborn visit to adolescent health counseling, we're committed to being your trusted healthcare partner.

Our child-friendly environment is designed to make visits comfortable and stress-free. We take time to listen to parents' concerns, explain conditions clearly, and ensure you leave with confidence in your child's care plan.

Why Parents Choose Us

  • 18+ years of pediatric expertise
  • UK-trained specialist
  • Child-friendly environment
  • Evidence-based treatment
  • Same-day sick visits
  • Comprehensive care 0-18 years

OUR SERVICES

Comprehensive Pediatric Services

From routine wellness exams to managing complex conditions, we offer a full range of pediatric services to support your child's health at every stage.

Well-Child Visits & Wellness Exams

Comprehensive preventive health assessments following IAP (Indian Academy of Pediatrics) guidelines to monitor your child's growth, development, and overall wellbeing at every stage.

Growth & Development Monitoring

Track your child's physical and cognitive development including height, weight, head circumference, and developmental milestones against standard growth charts.

Developmental Screening

Early detection and assessment of developmental delays in cognitive, motor, language, and social-emotional areas to ensure timely intervention when needed.

Nutrition & Diet Counseling

Personalized dietary guidance to support healthy eating habits, address feeding issues, manage childhood obesity, and ensure optimal nutrition for growing children.

Acute Illness Care

Expert diagnosis and treatment for common childhood illnesses including fever, cough, cold, ear infections, throat infections, stomach ailments, and skin conditions.

Chronic Disease Management

Ongoing care and comprehensive management for asthma, allergies, eczema, recurrent infections, and other chronic pediatric conditions with personalized treatment plans.

Concerned About Your Child's Health?

Schedule a consultation with Dr. Sanjay D Swamy today.

Book Appointment Call Now

ABOUT DR. SWAMY

Professional Summary

Dr. Sanjay D Swamy is a Chief Paediatric Intensivist based in Jayanagar, Bangalore. With 18 years of specialist experience in Paediatric Intensive Care, advanced critical care techniques, and international training. Specialized in treating critically ill neonates and children through dedicated fellowship training with extensive hands-on experience in complex paediatric procedures.

18
Years of Specialist Experience
Extensive expertise in PICU and critical care has positively impacted thousands of children and families.
7
Leading Institutions
Trained and worked across prestigious hospitals in India and UK including Birmingham Children's Hospital.
Book an Appointment More About Me

AGE-APPROPRIATE CARE

Specialized Care for Every Age

Children have different healthcare needs at different ages. We provide age-appropriate care tailored to each developmental stage.

01
0-28 days

Newborn

Initial health screening, feeding support, jaundice monitoring, and newborn care guidance for new parents.

02
1-12 months

Infant

Growth monitoring, vaccination schedules, milestone tracking, feeding transitions, and early development assessment.

03
1-3 years

Toddler

Speech development, behavioral guidance, nutrition counseling, potty training support, and social skill development.

04
3-5 years

Preschool

School readiness assessment, vision/hearing screening, immunization updates, and addressing common childhood concerns.

05
6-12 years

School Age

Academic performance concerns, sports fitness, puberty preparation, mental health awareness, and chronic condition management.

06
13-18 years

Adolescent

Teen health issues, growth spurts, emotional wellbeing, lifestyle counseling, and transition to adult healthcare.

CONDITIONS WE TREAT

Common Childhood Conditions

Expert diagnosis and treatment for a wide range of pediatric conditions. If your child is experiencing any health concern, we're here to help.

Fever & Infections
Cold, Cough & Flu
Ear Infections (Otitis Media)
Throat Infections & Tonsillitis
Asthma & Wheezing
Allergies & Eczema
Diarrhea & Vomiting
Constipation
Urinary Tract Infections
Skin Rashes & Infections
Growth Disorders
Nutritional Deficiencies
Behavioral Issues
Sleep Problems
ADHD Screening
Developmental Delays

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Got Questions? We Have Answers

How often should I bring my child for a wellness checkup?

We recommend wellness visits as per the IAP schedule: At birth, then at 2, 4, 6, 9, 12, 15, and 18 months for infants. After that, annual checkups are recommended for children above 2 years. Children with specific health concerns may need more frequent visits.

What age group does Dr. Sanjay Swamy treat?

We provide comprehensive pediatric care for children from birth (including newborns) through 18 years of age. This includes infants, toddlers, preschoolers, school-age children, and adolescents.

What should I bring to my child's first appointment?

Please bring previous medical records, vaccination history, birth certificate, list of current medications, insurance documents, and any specific questions or concerns you'd like to discuss. For newborns, bring hospital discharge summary.

Do you offer same-day sick visits for children?

Yes, we understand children can fall ill unexpectedly. We prioritize same-day appointments for sick children with fever, infections, or other acute conditions. Call our clinic early for same-day availability.

What vaccinations do you provide?

We provide all vaccinations as per the IAP immunization schedule including BCG, Hepatitis B, DTP, Polio, Hib, PCV, Rotavirus, MMR, Varicella, Typhoid, Hepatitis A, and annual flu vaccines. We also offer optional vaccines like HPV.

How do I know if my child's growth is normal?

During every visit, we measure height, weight, and head circumference (for infants) and plot them on standardized growth charts. We compare with previous measurements to ensure consistent growth. Any concerns are discussed and investigated promptly.
